description.value: The creature is a Daemon and has a Daemonic trait value of X. It counts as having the From Beyond trait. All of its attacks count as having the Warp Weapon quality. It has a number of Wounds equal to its normal Wounds plus its Toughness bonus doubled. It also gains a protection rating equal to X against all damage, which is not reduced by damage with the Warp Weapons quality. If reduced to 0 Wounds, it is cast back into the Warp. X represents the creature's Daemonic protection value.

system.benefit: The creature is a Daemon with the From Beyond trait. All attacks count as Warp Weapons. Gains bonus Wounds equal to doubled Toughness bonus, and X points of damage reduction against all attacks (bypassed only by Warp Weapons). Banished to the Warp at 0 Wounds. X is the Daemonic protection value.
